t_ch: 你好无情！
t_en: You're so heartless!

t_ch: 他不是你朋友吗？
t_en: But isn't he your friend?

t_ch: 你的朋友落在了呼雷手里，你却要抛下他？
t_en: Your friend is in Hoolay's clutches, and you're just going to leave him behind?

t_ch: 我是曜青将军的卫士，不是他的。我见过那头巨狼战斗，我有足够的判断力。要救人，等于送死。
t_en: Look, I'm the Yaoqing General's guard, not his. I've seen how that giant wolf fights, and there is no way. Trying to save my friend will only get us killed.

t_ch: 不知道你怎么想，我不会把生命浪费在这种毫无意义的选项上。
t_en: I don't know how you think, but I won't throw my life away for a lost cause.

t_ch: 听好了，我一直潜踪蹑迹尾随这些逃犯。我知道他们接下来打算做什么。他们的计划是闭锁整座幽囚狱出入的门户，拖延此事被外界知晓的时间。
t_en: Listen up, I've been tracking these fugitives, and I know their next move. They're planning to seal off the entire prison to keep the outside world in the dark.

t_ch: 最坏的结果是，我们全都折在那头巨狼爪下，幽囚狱被封死。无人知道我们的情况，很长一段时间里，也没人知道他们逃走了。
t_en: The worst-case scenario, we are all killed by that giant wolf, and the Shackling Prison is sealed off. No one will know about us or about their escape until it's too late.

t_ch: 最好的结果是——
t_en: And the best-case scenario...

t_ch: 我们大获全胜！
t_en: We kick all those bad guys' butts!

t_ch: 他用冷漠的表情上下打量着你。不知为何，你能读懂那没有任何表情的表情似乎在说「这个人脑壳坏掉了，真可怜啊」。
t_en: With an indifferent gaze, he sized you up and down. Somehow, you deciphered his expressionless face as saying, "This person's lost their mind, how pitiful."

t_ch: 我们将他们锁死在监狱里。
t_en: We trap them inside this prison.

t_ch: 做不到。因为我们比他们晚了一步。
t_en: No, we won't be able to. We're one step behind them.

t_ch: 双方一同被锁死在这里。
t_en: Both we and the intruders get trapped inside this prison.

t_ch: 啊，这里还是有聪明人的嘛。
t_en: Ah, looks like we've got some clever minds here after all.

t_ch: 最好的结果便是封锁大门，与敌同埋于深狱之中。绝对不能让那头巨狼离开此处。
t_en: The best-case scenario would be, we seal the gates and trap the enemy inside with us. We can't let that monstrous wolf escape.

t_ch: 如此一来，时间久了，外界察觉便会有援兵赶到。至于那时候我们是不是还活着，这也不是我们该考虑的选项。
t_en: Hopefully, someone will eventually notice that something is off and come to help. As for whether we'll still be alive by then, it's not something we should think about.

t_ch: 貊泽先生真是知道如何安慰人心。
t_en: You sure have a way of comforting people, Mr. Moze.

t_ch: 作为曜青人，我们的一生都在追寻为有价值的事情献身。
t_en: As a person of the Yaoqing, I've always searched for something meaningful to give my life to.

t_ch: 我必须活着离开此处，我的伙伴还在等我。
t_en: I have to make it out alive. My companions are waiting for me.

t_ch: 寒鸦身为冥世之人，早已死过一次。
t_en: As a netherworld dweller, I've already died once.

t_ch: 那我也豁出去了。
t_en: Well, then I'll give it my all.

t_ch: 不到最后一刻，还不是放弃的时候。
t_en: Yeah, we won't give up, not until the very last moment.

t_ch: 我也想活着出去。
t_en: I want to make it out alive, too.

t_ch: 不必担心，有我在这儿，就算有牺牲，也绝不让你成为第一个。
t_en: Don't worry. Even if we end up dying here, I won't let it happen to you first.

t_ch: 你也和貊泽先生一样会安慰人。
t_en: Well, you're just as good at comforting people as Mr. Moze.

t_ch: 真的没有别的选项了吗？
t_en: Are we really out of options?

t_ch: 三位都不是十王司属僚，断没有为此牺牲的理由。我身为判官，把守幽狱是分内之责。若有人能阻止呼雷逃离为害，这个人也应当是我，而不是你们。
t_en: None of you are part of the Ten-Lords Commission, so sacrificing yourselves isn't the right move. As a judge, it's my responsibility to guard this prison, and if someone should step up to stop Hoolay from escaping, it should be me, not you.

t_ch: 抵达门关处，我希望各位能竭力协助我将门户封死。之后我会尽我所能与步离人战斗，各位请找个地方躲起来，保护好自己。
t_en: Once we reach the gate, I hope you'll help me seal it. After that, I'll do everything I can to fight the borisin, and you find a safe place to hide and wait for reinforcements.

t_ch: 现在，我们向上去！
t_en: Now, let's proceed upward!

t_ch: 我们必须在步离逃犯离开前封死大门。
t_en: We must seal the entrance before the borisin fugitives get out.

t_ch: 幽狱武弁和机关拖不了他们太久，随我来！
t_en: The Prison Wardens and mechanisms won't be able to hold them for long. Follow me!

t_ch: 逃犯众多，大人请务必小心。
t_en: There are many fugitives. Please be careful, Your Honor.

t_ch: 逃犯正在冲击门关，大人请务必小心。
t_en: The fugitives are charging at the gate. Please be careful, Your Honor.

t_ch: 事态紧急，不可再耽搁下去了！
t_en: The situation is critical. We cannot delay any longer!

t_ch: 快到了！前方不远处就是门关！
t_en: We're almost there! The gate is just ahead!

t_ch: 是狱卒，拦住他们！为了呼雷大人，万死不辞！
t_en: Prison guards, stop them! For our great lord Hoolay!

t_ch: （嚎叫声）
t_en: (Howling noise)

t_ch: 诸位，我来拖住他们，请务必阻止呼雷逃脱！
t_en: I will hold them back. Don't let Hoolay escape!

t_ch: 幽囚狱已成杀场。狱卒们奋力抵抗，但椒丘只能眼看着他们倒下……
t_en: The Shackling Prison has become a killing field. The prison guards try to resist, but Jiaoqiu can only watch them fall...

t_ch: A Rraaa——
t_en: A-Rraaa...

t_ch: 如此…如此熟悉的回忆！那些追逐、啃噬、撕扯的回忆…回来了，都回来了！它们统统都回来了！
t_en: This brings back such... familiar memories! Memories of chasing, gnawing, and tearing... They're back, they're back! They've all come back!

t_ch: 大人，离自由仅有一步之遥了。穿过大门，就再也没人能阻止我们了。
t_en: My Lord, we're just one step away from freedom. Once we pass through the gate, no one will be able to stop us.

t_ch: 那么这个人质也就毫无价值了？末度，杀了他。
t_en: So, this hostage is useless now? Kill him, Mok Tok.

t_ch: （他要离开了…快想想办法…就像过去那样，椒丘，你这个无能为力的废物…想想办法啊……）
t_en: (He's getting away... Do something, Jiaoqiu... It's just like the old days, you useless loser... Just do something...)

t_ch: 也许，曜青的使节可以为了活下来和我们做笔交易，用他的身份帮助我们离开仙舟。我说的对吗，椒丘先生？
t_en: Maybe this Yaoqing messenger can strike a deal in exchange for his life. He can use his status to help us escape from the Xianzhou. What do you think, Mr. Jiaoqiu?

t_ch: 我不在的日子里，你们到底堕落成了何等可悲的模样？竟然开始向牲畜讨价还价？在我的记忆里，曜青人根本不会和都蓝的子孙谈这笔交易。
t_en: Just look at you! Fallen so low during my absence! You're even negotiating with livestock? As far as I recall, no one from the Yaoqing would ever consider a deal with Duran's offspring.

t_ch: （我必须…让这畜生留下…不管是为了飞霄，还是为了曜青……）
t_en: (I've got to... make this beast stay here... whether it's for the sake of Feixiao or the Yaoqing...)

t_ch: 成交。我当然有我活着的价值……
t_en: Deal. I certainly have more value alive...

t_ch: 我的身份，我对仙舟的了解，还有，我知道许多战首的部下们不知道的事情。
t_en: My identity, my knowledge of the Xianzhou, and my understanding of many things that your minions have no knowledge of... They'll all be valuable.

t_ch: 贱畜，鼓动你那条可怜的舌头，为自己残存的性命摇旗呐喊吧。说说看。
t_en: Lowly beast, muster up that pitiful tongue of yours and plead for what remains of your life. Speak up.

t_ch: 想必战首不知道，击败你的那个女人…<color=#dbc291ff>「镜流」</color>。她最近回到了罗浮。
t_en: I'm afraid you're unaware, the woman who defeated you, <color=#dbc291ff>Jingliu</color>... She has recently returned to the Luofu.

t_ch: 您复仇的机会，近在眼前。
t_en: Your opportunity for revenge is right in front of you.

t_ch: 大人！这个奴隶是在胡说八道，我从未听过这样的消息！请允许我立刻杀了他！
t_en: My Lord! This slave is talking nonsense. I've never heard anything about this! May I just kill him now?

t_ch: 闭嘴，末度！至于你，奴隶…从现在起，你必须寸步不离地跟在我身边。我让你开口，你才能开口；我让你迈步，你才能迈步。否则我会将你从头到尾，寸寸剐碎。你明白吗？
t_en: Silence, Mok Tok! And you, slave... From now on, you'll stay by my side. You'll only speak and move when I allow you to. Otherwise, I'll dismember you, from head to tail, inch by inch. Got it?

t_ch: 大人——
t_en: But my Lord...

t_ch: 末度，我们必须在这儿停留片刻了。不过你不用害怕。从踏出监狱的那一刻起，该害怕的是仙舟人。因为我将会让他们理解，什么是真正的灾难。
t_en: We must stay here for some time, Mok Tok. Fear not, because once I step out of the prison, it's the people of the Xianzhou who should tremble in fear. I'll show them what true calamity means.

t_ch: 现在，都蓝的崽子们，跟我走！
t_en: Now, Duran's whelps! Follow me!

t_ch: 报！幽囚狱消息断绝，我们接到了一只机巧鸟的传讯……
t_en: Report! After we lost contact with The Shackling Prison, we received a message from a cycrane...

t_ch: 狱中犯人暴动，重犯…呼雷不知去向！
t_en: The prisoners have revolted, and the criminal Hoolay... is nowhere to be found!

t_ch: 曜青使者，还有无名客呢？
t_en: What about the Yaoqing messengers and the Nameless?

t_ch: 暂无消息！我们正在尽快恢复与幽囚狱的联系！
t_en: No news at the moment! We're trying to restore contact with The Shackling Prison as soon as possible!

t_ch: 退下吧。
t_en: I see. You're dismissed.

t_ch: 景元将军，怀炎将军，如我们所料…建木升起并非事情的结束，而是开始。
t_en: General Jing Yuan, General Huaiyan, it's just as we suspected... the rise of the Ambrosial Arbor was not the end of things, but the beginning.

t_ch: 那只自烬灭军团伸向仙舟的手，已经将「毁灭」的种子埋下了。从这一刻开始直至不可见的未来，仙舟联盟将要面对更可怕的挑战——来自「毁灭」与丰饶孽物的双重挑战。
t_en: The hand of the Ruin Legion has already sown the seeds of "Destruction." From this moment on, the Xianzhou Alliance will face an even greater challenge, from both the Abominations of Abundance and the "Destruction" itself.

t_ch: 如果这就是他们想要的，我随时奉陪！
t_en: If this is what they want, I'm always up for a challenge!

t_ch: 我将以元帅特使的身份调度罗浮云骑，展开对呼雷的追捕。
t_en: As the Marshal's special envoy, I'll dispatch the Luofu Cloud Knights to pursue Hoolay myself.

t_ch: 池水下的东西终于按捺不住了。而我要做的，如我之前所说，「激浊扬清」。
t_en: Looks like the hidden dregs have finally come to the surface. And as I said before, it's time to wash them away, once and for all.

t_ch: 幽囚狱劫狱事件后\n\n神策府中
t_en: After the Shackling Prison Break\n\nIn the Seat of Divine Foresight

t_ch: 神策府中
t_en: At the Seat of Divine Foresight

t_ch: 怀炎大人，天舶司已完成了相关准备。不知您是否另有指示？
t_en: General Huaiyan, the Sky-Faring Commission has finished its preparations. Do you have any other instructions?

t_ch: 我将代表天击、神策二位将军的共识，暂时代行神策府与罗浮六司上下事务的指挥工作。
t_en: Representing the consensus between the Merlin's Claw and the Divine Foresight, I'll step in as the temporary commanding officer of the Seat of Divine Foresight and oversee the Six Commissions' affairs on the Luofu.

t_ch: 不知幽囚狱那边的情况如何？
t_en: What is the situation at The Shackling Prison?

t_ch: 呼雷这厮倒是逃得飞快，还将门关紧紧闭锁。如今云骑军已经重新与内部取得了联系。
t_en: Hoolay made a quick escape and even sealed the gates of the prison. As of now, the Cloud Knights have re-established contact with the staff inside.

t_ch: 不幸中的万幸，被困幽囚狱的两位无名客安然无事。
t_en: The good news is, the two Nameless who were trapped in The Shackling Prison are safe and sound.

t_ch: 呃，虽然以眼下的情况不知道该不该说「太好了」三个字…但{NICKNAME}和丹恒没事，我就放心了。
t_en: Um, I know I shouldn't use the word "great" given the current situation... but I'm relieved that {NICKNAME} and Dan Heng are safe.

t_ch: 曜青仙舟的使者中有一人生死不明，应当是遭到了步离人的劫持。
t_en: We've lost contact with one of the messengers from the Xianzhou Yaoqing. The borisin have likely taken him hostage.

t_ch: 驭空，不必担心，飞霄一力承担起猎狼行动，对她的实力，你应该很清楚才是。
t_en: Don't worry, Yukong. Feixiao is leading the Wolf Hunt operation, and you know how capable she is.

t_ch: 大人，我不怀疑飞霄将军的能力，我更关心的是演武仪典。
t_en: I have no doubt about General Feixiao's capabilities, General Huaiyan. I'm more concerned about the Wardance.

t_ch: 依照计划，仪典将于三个时辰后召开，竞锋舰会即刻启动，允许观众登舰观赛。
t_en: According to the plan, the ceremony will begin in six hours. The Skysplitter will be activated, and all visitors will board the ship to watch the contest.

t_ch: 可如今呼雷下落不明，一切充满了变数。
t_en: But now, with Hoolay's whereabouts unknown, everything is filled with uncertainty.

t_ch: 演武仪典还要照常举办吗？
t_en: Should the Wardance really be held as scheduled?

t_ch: 三月说的不错。爷爷，听说那个从幽囚狱里逃走的罪犯不是一般的可怕。万一有什么闪失……
t_en: March is right, Grandpa. I heard the escaped prisoner from The Shackling Prison is beyond formidable. In case anything goes wrong...

t_ch: 云璃，那么眼下的情况该如何处置啊？
t_en: So, Yunli, what do you think we should do?

t_ch: 当然是…唔，当然应该宣布戒严，将人力投入搜捕工作。至于演武仪典，还是先宣布无限期延迟吧。
t_en: Well... hmm... I believe we should declare martial law and allocate manpower to search for the escaped prisoners. And for the Wardance, it's better to announce an indefinite delay for now.

t_ch: 你说的是个万全的法子。可惜越是理想的方案，越难施展得开。依我看，你的方法至少有两方人马不会接受。
t_en: Your plan sounds solid, but unfortunately, solid plans rarely get a chance to be implemented. I believe there are at least two parties who won't accept your approach.

t_ch: 哪两方人马？
t_en: Which two parties?

t_ch: 其一是为演武仪典而来的众多商旅游客。宣布戒严，就等于公开声明罗浮并不安全，试问外人会作何反应？当然是人心惶惶，混乱不堪。
t_en: The first are the many travelers who have come all the way here for the Wardance. If we declare martial law now, it's like declaring that the Luofu isn't safe. How do you think the outsiders would react? They'd be terrified, and chaos might ensue.

t_ch: 其二是罗浮仙舟的六司职员。筹办演武仪典所耗的人力、物力本就不可计数，眼下突然中止，又要无限期推迟，一系列变化只怕内部也难以承受。
t_en: The second party is the staff of the Xianzhou Luofu's Six Commissions. They've invested a lot of resources and manpower into organizing the Wardance. Suddenly suspending it indefinitely would create numerous challenges for them.

t_ch: 当然了，你的法子倒也不是没人认同。
t_en: But of course, not everyone disagrees with your idea.

t_ch: …真、真的吗？
t_en: ...R—Really?

t_ch: 此次劫狱事件的幕后操纵者，想必会高举双手赞成你的看法。
t_en: The mastermind behind this incident would fully support your opinion presumably.

t_ch: 呼雷在探视中逃出囚笼，你们和彦卿又在迴星港发现了步离间谍…若说这背后无人弄鬼，只怕刚出生的娃娃都不会相信。
t_en: Hoolay's escape and your discovery of borisin spies at Stargazer Navalia... Even a child could guess that these events were orchestrated.

t_ch: 逃犯只是一枚棋子，那只执棋的手走下这一步，想看到的是一个罗浮人人猜疑，彼此自危的乱局。宣布戒严与推迟演武仪典，就正中了对手下怀，把呼雷带来的恐惧提前放到了台面上。
t_en: The fugitive is just one piece in the game. The one controlling the pieces wants to spread chaos and suspicion among the people on the Luofu. If we declare martial law and postpone the Wardance, we'll fall into their trap and instill fear in people even before Hoolay actually does anything.

t_ch: …那该怎么办嘛！
t_en: ...So, what do we do?

t_ch: 那些搜捕的事情当然要做，但罗浮之上的一切必须照旧如常，至少看起来一切如常。
t_en: We'll search for the prisoners while maintaining order on the Luofu, acting as if nothing has happened.

t_ch: 一切如常？彦卿这家伙跑了个没影，说是打算为将军们分忧解难。这下可好，东道主的守擂剑士缺席，倒是怎么个一切如常啊？
t_en: As if nothing has happened? Yanqing said he'd assist the generals, and now he's nowhere to be found. With the host's ringmaster gone, how are we supposed to act like nothing has happened?

t_ch: 对喽，这就是我把你们二位叫来此处的原因了。
t_en: That's why I called the two of you here.

t_ch: 莫非要我代替彦卿守擂？
t_en: Are you suggesting that I take Yanqing's place as ringmaster?

t_ch: 莫非要云璃代替彦卿守擂？
t_en: Are you suggesting that Yunli takes Yanqing's place as ringmaster?

t_ch: 云璃师傅，怀炎将军这是想让你替彦卿守擂呢？
t_en: Master Yunli, is General Huaiyan asking you to be the ringmaster instead of Yanqing?

t_ch: 非也，非也。
t_en: No, that's not the case.

t_ch: 莫非怀炎将军打算亲自上阵？
t_en: Are you planning to take up the role of the ringmaster yourself, General Huaiyan?

t_ch: 老朽当然不会闲着，但我要去的地方却不是竞锋舰。
t_en: Of course I'll do my part, but not on the Skysplitter.

t_ch: 难不成…怀炎将军想让我…代替彦卿…登台守擂…吗？
t_en: General Huaiyan... Are you asking me... to take Yanqing's place... as the ringmaster?

t_ch: 三月小姐真是冰雪聪明！老朽的意思嘛，就是这么个意思。
t_en: You caught on quickly, Miss March! That's exactly what I mean.

t_ch: 爷爷，三月是景元将军请来观礼的客人！哪有让客人代表罗浮登台守擂的！这样岂不是让人耻笑罗浮仙舟无人了？
t_en: But Miss March is a guest invited by General Jing Yuan, Grandpa! How can an outsider represent the Luofu in the ring? It will make the Xianzhou Luofu a laughingstock.

t_ch: 小傻瓜，星穹列车的无名客蜚声星海，能请来是何等光荣！何况三月小姐是以「云骑骁卫弟子」之名出战，又怎么能算是「罗浮仙舟无人」？
t_en: Dear child, the Nameless of the Astral Express are renowned throughout the cosmos! It's an honor to have them participate in the ceremony! Plus, Miss March is a disciple of the little Cloud Knight Lieutenant. How can she be regarded as an "outsider"?

t_ch: 两位，「演武仪典」的召开不容有失。我要托付你们的绝不只是擂台上的胜负荣辱，还有竞锋舰的安全。
t_en: We can't afford to have any problems during the Wardance. I'm entrusting you not only with the honor of the ring, but also with the security of the Skysplitter.

t_ch: 驭空，把接下来的安排告诉她们。
t_en: Yukong, please explain to them the rest of the arrangements.

t_ch: 幽囚狱劫狱事件后\n\n星槎海街头
t_en: After the Shackling Prison Break\n\nOn the Starskiff Haven streets

t_ch: 星槎海街头
t_en: Starskiff Haven Street

t_ch: 说起来，这演武仪典到底什么时候开始啊？我瞧着那艘竞锋舰在天空上飘了好些天了，啥时能登上去瞧瞧呢？
t_en: Seriously, when is this Wardance going to start? The Skysplitter has been hovering there for ages. When can we board and see what's inside?

t_ch: 这就是长生种的生活方式吗？节奏如此之慢。我情绪中枢里「期待」的效用值空前高涨啊。不行，我得喝些冷却液给它降降温了。
t_en: Is this how long-life species live? Everything proceeds so slowly. The effectiveness of "anticipation" in my emotional center is at an all-time high. Oh, I need to drink some coolant.

t_ch: 放心吧，只要买了票，地衡司会提前把登舰通知发给咱们的。我看邸报上说，在典礼召开前，竞锋舰会鸣礼炮示意呢！
t_en: Relax, the Realm-Keeping Commission will send boarding notices to all ticket holders. The gazette said the Skysplitter will fire a salute before the ceremony starts!

t_ch: 看首日赛事安排，作为东道主的守擂剑士一口气接下了四场挑战？听说他只是个半大孩子，真的假的？巴铎，你下注哪边赢？
t_en: I saw the schedule for the first day of the tournament. Can you believe the ringmaster accepted four challenges? And he's just a kid! So, who are you betting on, Bardeau?

t_ch: 哪边都不下。我在泰科铵看机动球赛时把信用点输了个精光。这次我决定不再寄希望靠概率游戏来完成「暴富」这一任务进程……
t_en: I'm betting on neither. I lost all my credits betting on Roboball games in Taikiyan. This time, I've decided not to rely on probability games to accomplish my target of "getting rich"...

t_ch: 演武仪典，唉……
t_en: Wardance...

t_ch: {NICKNAME}，你来了啊。
t_en: There you are, {NICKNAME}.

t_ch: 听说你和丹恒先生去面见判官，结果整个幽囚狱都陷入了动乱，我还在担心你们呢。二位没事就好。
t_en: I heard you and Mr. Dan Heng went to meet the judges, and then a riot broke out in The Shackling Prison. I was so worried about you. Thank goodness, you both made it out safe.

t_ch: 谈谈发生的事…
t_en: Discuss what happened...

t_ch: 幽囚狱里暴动了…幸好我们被狱卒保护了起来，等来了云骑军的救援。
t_en: There was a revolt in The Shackling Prison... Fortunately, we were protected by the guards until the Cloud Knights arrived to rescue us.

t_ch: 你那边发生了什么？
t_en: What happened on your end?

t_ch: 我本打算带三月和云璃一同去迴星港观望竞锋舰，但没想到，那地方竟出现了一群来历不明，却持有官方身份的狐人。
t_en: I was planning to take Miss March and Yunli to Stargazer Navalia to see the Skysplitter up close, but we stumbled upon a group of suspicious foxians carrying official identities.

t_ch: 他们举止古怪。出于好奇，我们追踪了那几人，结果发现他们竟然是伪装成狐人的步离人！
t_en: They were acting strange, so out of curiosity, we decided to follow them. It turns out that they were actually borisin disguised as foxians!

t_ch: 从一些线索来看，他们进入迴星港是为呼雷的逃亡做准备的，却阴差阳错被我们撞破了。
t_en: It seems they infiltrated Stargazer Navalia in order to prepare for Hoolay's escape, and we foiled their plans by pure chance.

t_ch: 这些家伙的伪装身份是由谁提供的？借着演武仪典，还有多少相同的伪装者混进了仙舟？
t_en: I wonder who provided them with those disguises, and how many more borisin have taken advantage of the Wardance to infiltrate the ship?

t_ch: 神策府这边打算怎么办？
t_en: What's your plan now?

t_ch: 步离人千里迢迢潜入罗浮，试图用阴谋诡计救出他们的领袖…这整件事都太过蹊跷，不像步离所为，倒与此前建木灾异时药王乱党的行动有几分相似。
t_en: The borisin traveled all the way here to infiltrate the Luofu and attempt to rescue their leader with a crafty scheme... This is completely unlike them. To be honest, it reminds me of what the Disciples of Sanctus Medicus did during the Ambrosial Arbor Crisis.

t_ch: 三位将军心有警惕，全都行动了起来，打算将逃犯和祸首连根拔起，以免再生事端。
t_en: At present, all three generals are on guard and taking action to hunt down the fugitives and the mastermind behind it all, in order to prevent further trouble.

t_ch: 可是，如果这些步离人能伪装成狐人…我们又该从哪儿开始将这些家伙挖出来呢？
t_en: However, if these borisin can disguise themselves as foxians... where do we even begin to search for them?

t_ch: 那些游客在谈论你呢…
t_en: Those tourists over there are talking about you...

t_ch: 是啊，我也听到了。不过，要让他们失望了。我已经禀报了将军，放弃了守擂剑士的身份。
t_en: Yeah, I heard them, too, but I'm afraid I'll have to disappoint them. I've already reported to General Jing Yuan that I'll give up my role as the ringmaster.

t_ch: 什么？你不去守擂了？
t_en: What? You're not going to defend the ring?

t_ch: 你不是为此准备了很久吗？
t_en: But haven't you been preparing for it for so long?

t_ch: 对我而言，罗浮眼下的安全更优先。在担起守擂剑士这份荣耀前，我必须先履行作为云骑骁卫的职责。
t_en: The security of the Luofu is more important to me than anything else. I need to fulfill my duties as a Cloud Knight Lieutenant before taking on the honor of being a ringmaster.

t_ch: 那些来来往往的游客，他们想要的只是欣赏一场精彩剑斗罢了。这样的比武，谁去都可以，又何必非得是我。
t_en: Those tourists just want to see some good sword fights. Anyone can participate in this kind of tournament. It doesn't have to be me.

t_ch: 真正的胜负不在竞锋舰的擂台上，在这儿。如果不能尽快将逃犯抓捕归案，以呼雷穷凶极恶的素行，他一定会闹个天翻地覆。
t_en: The real challenge lies beyond the ring on the Skysplitter. If we don't capture the fugitives soon, Hoolay will wreak havoc.

t_ch: 这次逃狱事件的背后显然有人在精心谋划，试图掀起乱局，要是让这些人得逞了，云骑还有什么荣誉可言？
t_en: Obviously, there is someone behind the scenes orchestrating this prison break, intending to spread chaos. If we fail to thwart their evil plan, what honor will be left for us to uphold?

t_ch: 说得不错。
t_en: Well said.

t_ch: 虽然身高高不过折凳，但罗浮的小娃娃也有不输曜青战士的志气啊。
t_en: You may be tiny in stature, but your ambition matches that of the Yaoqing's warriors.

t_ch: 这和身高没关系吧。
t_en: Hey, this has nothing to do with my height.

t_ch: 将军，你在这做什么？
t_en: What brings you here, General?

t_ch: 将军们不是行动起来了吗？
t_en: I thought all the generals were on the move already?

t_ch: 是我让彦卿挑个能吃饱喝足的地方。在「巡猎」之前，猎人也得做好万全准备。
t_en: Yes, I suggested to Yanqing that we find a place to have a decent meal. A hunter must be well-fed before "the hunt."

t_ch: 到底是「天击将军」，大难临头还有这么好的胃口…还请飞霄将军速战速决。
t_en: You still have a good appetite even in the face of disaster — you truly are the Merlin's Claw... Please, finish the food quickly so we can get to work, General Feixiao.

t_ch: 那恐怕由不得我——动筷子吧，我让你来这儿，是要看着你吃光它们。
t_en: Well, that's not up to me... Dig in. I called you here so you could enjoy the food.

t_ch: 我？现在哪是悠闲吃饭的时候…而且这也太多了吧！
t_en: Me? This isn't the time for a leisurely meal... and this is way too much for me!

t_ch: 怎么，我吃就可以，你吃就不行？
t_en: Oh? You'd give me time to enjoy a meal but not yourself?

t_ch: 自从见了步离间谍，你就一直心神不宁，忙前走后水米不进。呼雷可不是瘪着肚子就能打赢的对手。
t_en: Ever since you encountered those borisin spies, you've been so busy that you've hardly eaten anything. You can't defeat Hoolay on an empty stomach.

t_ch: 别太心急了。给你一顿饭时间，好好冷静下吧。
t_en: Take your time. Enjoy the meal and calm yourself.

t_ch: 呼雷现在还下落不明，椒丘先生也落在他手中，咱们等待的时间越长，情况就越不可控啊。
t_en: Hoolay's whereabouts are still unknown, and they've even taken Mr. Jiaoqiu hostage. The longer we wait, the more complicated the situation becomes.

t_ch: 椒丘总说我是云骑里最耐不住性子的人，他的劝诫向来是对的，所以你没理由比我更着急。
t_en: Jiaoqiu always said I'm the most impatient person among the Cloud Knights, and I can't argue with that. So there's no reason for you to be more anxious than me.

t_ch: 我和步离孽物对抗多年，深知他们的凶残，也知晓那凶残背后的狡诈。这次劫狱事件，步离人显然是有备而来。敌在暗处，没理由贸然走上台前。
t_en: I've fought against borisin abominations for years, and I know their ferocity and cunning well. The borisin were clearly well-prepared for this prison break, and now they are staying in the shadows. They have no reason to rush out into the open.

t_ch: 猎物狡诈凶蛮，猎人更要以耐心撑持。犹如挽弓射敌，蓄力满弦，方能一击必杀。一旦呼雷失去耐心，露出爪牙，便是解决它的最佳时机。
t_en: When facing cunning and ferocious prey, the hunter must be more patient, biding their time to seize the golden chance for a decisive blow. Once Hoolay loses his patience and reveals himself, that's when we'll strike.

t_ch: 这最佳时机什么时候才会出现？
t_en: But when will that time come?

t_ch: 我说过了…只需一顿饭的时间。
t_en: Like I said... it's only one meal away.

t_ch: 演武仪典召开前三个时辰\n\n幽囚狱中
t_en: Three dual-hours before the Wardance convenes\n\nIn The Shackling Prison

t_ch: 幽囚狱中
t_en: In the Shackling Prison

t_ch: 幽囚狱管束无方，劳动将军大驾，感激不尽。
t_en: I am sorry for our improper management, and I truly appreciate your assistance, General.

t_ch: 判官多礼了。云骑战阵折冲，幽府威罚罪囚，云骑与幽府同为仙舟的一体两面。能为十王司效劳，也是我的荣幸。
t_en: There is no need to apologize. We Cloud Knights fight on the battlefield, while you judges punish the criminals. We are two sides of the same Xianzhou Luofu, and it is my honor to serve the Ten-Lords Commission.

t_ch: 犯人逃离的情况我已有数，说说幽囚狱眼下的状况吧。
t_en: I've grasped the situation of the prison break. Now, tell me more about the current state of The Shackling Prison.

t_ch: 步离狂徒伪装潜入幽囚狱，破狱释囚，制造混乱。
t_en: Borisin infiltrated the prison in disguise and released the prisoners, spreading chaos.

t_ch: 拘、锁、刑、问四部当值判官中，拘字部判官雪衣暂时阵亡。我将代其职责，命金人勾魂使与冥差们进入各层，争取尽快恢复失控的区域。
t_en: Among the judges on duty in the four divisions, Judge Xueyi from the Detention Division was killed and is temporarily unavailable. So, I'm taking over her duties and commanding Aurumaton Spectral Envoys and spiritfarers to quickly restore order in the affected areas.

t_ch: 我与身后这两位将会下到幽狱深处探查线索。
t_en: I, and the two behind me, will go deeper into the prison to investigate.

t_ch: 将军，如今各层的情势依旧混乱不明，您亲临险地——
t_en: But General, the situation inside is still chaotic and perilous. Your presence would be...

t_ch: 云骑将军亲履险地是常事。呼雷出逃，曜青来使遭到步离人挟持，生死不明。这桩祸事非同小可。
t_en: It's common for Cloud Knight generals to face danger directly. Hoolay has escaped, and the Yaoqing envoy is being held hostage by the borisin. His fate is unknown. This is a grave matter.

t_ch: 天击将军非但没有半句怨言，反而决定出手擒狼，以绝后患。如此滚热的心肠，于情于理，我想罗浮都必须给个交代——
t_en: Not only did the Merlin's Claw offer no reproach, she decided to go after Hoolay herself to prevent further calamity. I believe the Luofu owes her something in return for her fervent determination...

t_ch: 劫狱的步离人从何处得知呼雷关押的区域？又为何如此赶巧，他们在曜青来使准备押解之前执行了计划……
t_en: How did the infiltrators learn about the location where Hoolay was held? And how did they time their plan just before the Yaoqing messengers were ready to escort him...?

t_ch: 在我看来，这些问题的答案并不难找。重要的是，能不能找到蛛丝马迹，牵出幕后黑手。
t_en: Finding the answers to these questions shouldn't be too difficult. What truly matters is if we can gather the clues that lead us to the mastermind behind all of this.

t_ch: 我明白了。只不过将军欲行之事，恐怕很难啊。
t_en: I understand, but I'm afraid it won't be an easy task.

t_ch: 长久以来，这只幕后黑手罔顾罗浮安危，一意孤行。退让只会助长对方的气焰，进一步危及罗浮的太平。
t_en: For a long time, this hidden force has been pursuing their own goals and undermining the security of the Luofu. Backing down now will only encourage them to further endanger the peace here.

t_ch: 诚如将军所言。将军所做决断，十王司将倾力协助。
t_en: The Ten-Lords Commission will support your decision with everything we have, General.

t_ch: 丹恒、灵砂，要劳烦两位随我一起走这趟苦差了。
t_en: Dan Heng and Lingsha, I'll need both of you to accompany me on this challenging journey.

t_ch: 丹鼎司的分内之责罢了，便是苦药也得吃下去呵。将军想打哪儿查起？
t_en: Well, it's part of my responsibilities as the Cauldron Master. So, where would you like to start, General?

t_ch: 就从那些伪装成狐人的步离人开始。
t_en: Let's start with those borisin disguised as foxians.

t_ch: 我已让人将物证准备妥帖了。
t_en: My people have already prepared the evidence.

t_ch: 按照彦卿骁卫的报告，他在迴星港发现几个来历不明的狐人，一番追踪后察觉对方是由步离人伪装。这是其中一人的遗体。
t_en: According to Lieutenant Yanqing's report, he stumbled upon a few suspicious foxians at Stargazer Navalia. After following them, he discovered that they were actually borisin in disguise. This is one of the bodies.

t_ch: 看他如今的样子，怎么也无法想象这家伙能伪装成狐人。
t_en: Looking at him now, it's hard to imagine how he transformed into a foxian.

t_ch: 丹士们从他的遗骸中检测出了一些…复杂的药物成分，似乎能解释这些步离人为何可以变形成狐人。
t_en: My alchemists detected some... complex ingredients in his remains, which might explain how these borisin were able to disguise themselves as foxians.

t_ch: 简单来说，狐人与步离人同宗同源，虽然如今形貌殊异，但二者在基因层面并无太大差别。这种药物能允许步离人暂时变化形骸，以狐人的面貌示人。
t_en: Simply put, foxians and borisin share a common ancestry. Although they look completely different now, there isn't much genetic difference between them. This medicine allows borisin to temporarily change their shape into that of foxians.

t_ch: 也就是说，一旦对方停止服药，很快就会原形毕露？
t_en: So, in other words, if they stop taking the medicine, their true form will soon be revealed?

t_ch: 步离人代谢很快，药效不持久…
t_en: Borisin have fast metabolisms, so the effects of medicines don't last long...

t_ch: 是啊，这也意味着在罗浮内部有为这些伪装者提供药物的来源。
t_en: Indeed. This means that these borisin have a steady supply of the medicine within the Luofu.

t_ch: 将军大人熟悉的伪装潜入手法…
t_en: An infiltration technique the general is familiar with...

t_ch: 熟悉的配方，熟悉的手法。
t_en: The formula and technique seem oddly familiar.

t_ch: 唉，「药王秘传」除之不尽，这回丹鼎司怕是又脱不了干系了。
t_en: The Disciples of Sanctus Medicus. Looks like the Alchemy Commission is involved once again.

t_ch: 妾身在梳理他们所使用的丹方时，发现其中有一味「还尘驻形丹」，专供探子们压制魔阴身的征兆，维持平常形貌。与步离人体内的药物两相对比——
t_en: When I was sorting through the prescriptions they used, I came across one called "Semblance Reversion Essence." It's designed to help those disciples suppress signs of their mara-struck form and maintain their normal appearance. When I compared it to the medicine found in the borisin's body...

t_ch: 想来这是同一种东西吧？
t_en: They're one and the same, aren't they?

t_ch: 药性与成分虽然不同，但原理确是一致的。
t_en: The medicinal properties and ingredients may differ, but the principle remains the same.

t_ch: 从远古时代起，步离人一直都在追求更强大的血肉之躯，将狐人视为孱弱之辈。如今为了救出战首，这些人竟愿意伪装成狐人的形貌…他们所下的决心当真不小啊。
t_en: Since ancient times, the borisin have always sought to have more powerful bodies, regarding the foxians as weaklings. Yet, in order to save their Warhead, they were willing to disguise themselves as foxians... Their determination is quite remarkable.

t_ch: 如果这群步离探子全都服食了伪装药物，我建议就顺着这条线开始查起。两位，随我来。
t_en: If these infiltrators rely on the medicine to maintain their disguise, then following this lead in our investigation seems prudent. Please follow me.

t_ch: …这名死去的云骑身上也有药气？
t_en: ...Did this Cloud Knight also take the medicine?

t_ch: 灵砂挑开云骑的甲胄，探手摸索片刻。
t_en: Lingsha peels open the Cloud Knight's armor and stretches out her hands to search for a moment.

t_ch: 不，这应当是个步离人。没来得及变回原形，就被狱卒当场格杀了。
t_en: No, this is a borisin in disguise. A guard killed him before he could return to his original form.

t_ch: 这群步离人都身着官方服色。除云骑之外，还有两人以天舶司和工造司的身份示人。
t_en: All these borisin are dressed in official attire. Besides the Cloud Knight, there were also two borisin disguised as members of the Sky-Faring Commission and the Artisanship Commission.

t_ch: 能办妥这些伪装身份的人想必位高权重…我们去别处瞧瞧。
t_en: Whoever is providing them with official identities must hold a position of power... Let's search elsewhere.

t_ch: 狱卒倒在地上，肢体呈现不自然的扭曲。
t_en: A prison guard is collapsed on the ground, her body twisted unnaturally.

t_ch: （检查武弁的遗体）
t_en: (Examine the remains of the warden)

t_ch: 好惊人的力量…凶手只用了一击便打碎了这名武弁的骨骼。
t_en: Incredible strength... The attacker shattered this warden's bones with a single blow.

t_ch: 这蛮力，绝不是寻常的步离人能办到的…多半是呼雷。
t_en: Such brute strength is not something an ordinary borisin possesses... This is likely the work of Hoolay.

t_ch: 恕妾身冒昧一问，这个步离人真有如此凶悍？
t_en: If I may be so bold to ask, is this borisin truly that formidable?

t_ch: 我比灵砂小姐活得久些，也多经历了几场战事。对于联盟，步离人始终是最难缠的敌人。而呼雷则是连步离人自己都畏惧不已的怪物。
t_en: I have lived a bit longer and engaged in a few more battles than you, Miss Lingsha. To the Alliance, borisin have always been the most formidable adversaries, and Hoolay is a monster feared even among his own kind.

t_ch: 他以一己之力统合众多猎群，纠集丰饶孽物大军，多次将联盟的军队逼入险地。
t_en: With his strength, Hoolay united numerous borisin packs, forming a grand army of Abominations of Abundance. They constantly pushed the Alliance's armies into perilous positions.

t_ch: 七百多年前，我随恩师出征讨伐孽物，亲眼目睹了那头巨兽降临后整个战场的惨况。
t_en: Over seven centuries ago, I followed my mentor on a campaign against the abominations, and I personally witnessed the devastation on the battlefield after Hoolay appeared.

t_ch: 即便服下压制狼毒恐惧的丹药，但仍然有无数云骑在他的凶残气势之下，恐慌到连抬手反抗都无有余力…若不是前任剑首以霜刃封住呼雷行动，胜负仍未可知。
t_en: Even with medicinal pellets that suppressed the fear caused by his Lupitoxin, countless Cloud Knights succumbed to panic in the face of his murderous aura. They couldn't even raise a hand in resistance... If the former Sword Champion hadn't immobilized Hoolay with her Frost Blade, the outcome of that fateful battle could have been very different.

t_ch: 那场大战的尾声，队伍里仅剩下了寥寥数人。「赤月临照，血光飞射」…当时眼前所见的一切，只剩下满目殷红。
t_en: By the end of the battle, only a few of us remained. "The crimson moon casts the sheen of blood on all"... Everything I saw was painted dark red.

t_ch: 既然如此，为何在降服这头恶兽后没将他处以极刑，反而只是关押起来？
t_en: If that's the case, why wasn't the beast executed instead of being imprisoned?

t_ch: 在朱明仙舟，判官们将罪无可恕又百杀不死的丰饶孽物丢进恒星的劫火中焚烧。
t_en: On the Xianzhou Zhuming, the judges cast those unforgivable and nearly immortal Abominations of Abundance into the eternal flames of the stars, reducing them to ashes.

t_ch: 所谓「不死」不过是个名头罢了。世上岂有真正不死不灭的东西？不知罗浮为何要将这颗毒瘤延宕压抑如此之久，导致今日难以收拾的局面？
t_en: Their so-called "immortality" is just a facade. I mean, nothing can truly defy death, can it? I just don't understand why the Luofu kept this tumor for so long, leading to the terrible situation we're facing now.

t_ch: 也对，罗浮人向来宅心仁厚，即使对寄生在丹鼎司的瘤子，也舍不得剜肉疗毒，倒是把想要施救的医者送去了朱明仙舟。
t_en: But I guess I understand. The people of the Luofu are known for their kindness. Even when faced with the malignant tumor within the Alchemy Commission, they couldn't bring themselves to cut it out. Instead, they exiled the healer who tried to solve the problem to the Xianzhou Zhuming.

t_ch: 看得出来，灵砂小姐对我有怨气。药王秘传死灰复燃一事，景元责无旁贷。至于呼雷这头孽物为何只被镇伏在牢狱中…我也可以为你解释一二。
t_en: I understand if you hold grudges against me, Miss Lingsha. I take the blame for the resurgence of the Disciples of Sanctus Medicus. As for why Hoolay was only imprisoned... I can shed some light on that too.

t_ch: 妾身只是一介医士，不知旧事，还请将军点拨解惑。
t_en: I'm just a healer, and I'm not familiar with the past. I'd appreciate it if you could enlighten me, General.

t_ch: 好，那我们这一路上慢慢说来。
t_en: Alright, let me tell you more about it as we go.

t_ch: 囚牢中，一名囚犯倒在地上。重获自由的快乐和突如其来的错愕，这两种表情在死亡的瞬间一同凝固在了他惨白的脸上。
t_en: A prisoner is on the ground. The joy of regaining freedom and sudden shock, these two expressions are frozen on his pale face at the moment of death.

t_ch: 他气绝之前曾被人咬开动脉，吸走大量的血。真是粗暴残忍的手法……
t_en: Someone bit open his arteries and drained almost all of his blood while he was still alive. Such a cruel and ruthless act...

t_ch: 若无生血生肉吞食，步离人便会饥渴难耐，他们虽为长生种，但却更接近掠食的兽类。听说幽囚狱中对呼雷禁绝饮食……
t_en: Despite being a long-lived species, borisin are actually more like predatory beasts that must feed on raw blood and flesh. I've heard that Hoolay was deprived of food and water in The Shackling Prison...

t_ch: 真是难以想象，七百多年不曾进食饮水，他一定压抑饥饿许久。不知道那位被他劫持的曜青人质能否逃过一劫？
t_en: It's hard to imagine how he managed to suppress his hunger for over seven centuries. Will the hostage from the Yaoqing be able to avoid being his meal?

t_ch: 这便是丰饶孽物的可怕之处。对他施加剑树之刑，消磨其生命力，结果他的刑期反倒成了对我们耐心的考验。
t_en: Such is the terrible nature of the Abominations of Abundance. We subjected him to the Forest of Swords to drain his life force, but in the end, his punishment turned into a test of our patience.

t_ch: 诚如灵砂小姐所说，将百杀不死的怪物投入恒星，是个一了百了的法子。可惜……
t_en: Just like you said, Miss Lingsha, casting a creature that can't be killed into a star would be a way to permanently get rid of it, but unfortunately...

t_ch: …可惜狐人不答应。
t_en: ...The foxians didn't agree to that.

t_ch: 不错，呼雷所犯的罪行不仅是杀戮。数千场战争中，我们尽力剿灭步离人，但他凭着不知源头的邪术，将无数狐人化为受它驱策的走卒与器兽，一再卷土重来。
t_en: Exactly. The atrocities committed by Hoolay went beyond mere massacres. Throughout numerous wars, we made every effort to eradicate the borisin, but Hoolay, with his mysterious sorcery, turned countless foxians into his pawns, and so the borisin kept returning.

t_ch: 狐人一族日夜诅咒他的名字，甚至用他的名字来吓止小儿夜啼。任这样的巨恶在一夕之间痛快死去，联盟内的狐人又岂肯甘心？
t_en: The foxians curse his name day and night, and they even use it to scare children into staying quiet. How could they grant a swift death to such a great sinner?

t_ch: 不知灵砂小姐是否清楚，为何最后呼雷没有被狐人居多的曜青仙舟收押，却独独囚禁在了罗浮之上？
t_en: I wonder if you know why Hoolay wasn't taken into custody by the foxian-majority Xianzhou Yaoqing, but instead imprisoned in the Xianzhou Luofu, Miss Lingsha.

t_ch: 刚才将军说了，令师武艺超群，将呼雷击败，立下大功。因此元帅下令将这头凶兽交由罗浮处置，也算是一份荣耀？
t_en: As you mentioned, your mentor was an exceptional warrior and was the one who defeated Hoolay, an extraordinary achievement. Therefore, the marshal placed this feral beast under the jurisdiction of the Xianzhou Luofu as an honor, I assume?

t_ch: 灵砂小姐对于这一处置有莫大的误解，容我慢慢道来。
t_en: It seems you have a major misunderstanding about this arrangement, Miss Lingsha. Allow me to explain it to you.

t_ch: 狼形的机甲瘫痪成了一座金属小山。
t_en: The wolf-shaped mech disintegrates into a pile of metal.

t_ch: 我听彦卿说过，公司的舰船遭到了步离人袭击。船上运送的就是这东西？
t_en: Yanqing told me that an IPC ship was attacked by borisin. Is this what they were transporting on the ship?

t_ch: 关闭后也会自启动的生物兵器…
t_en: A biomimetic weapon that will auto-restart even after being turned off...

t_ch: 博识学会有关长生特性的研究…
t_en: The Intelligentsia Guild's research on the traits of longevity...

t_ch: 是。工造司和丹鼎司联手做了勘验…这机器的部件使用了特殊加工过的步离生物组织。
t_en: Yes, the Artisanship Commission and Alchemy Commission conducted a joint examination and found that... the parts of this machine are made from specially refined borisin bio-tissue.

t_ch: 听说一直以来博识学会都在研究长生种的生物特性，想获取能用于医疗或战斗的成果。只是碍于和联盟的表面关系，不敢做得太过出格。
t_en: I heard the Intelligentsia Guild has been researching the biological properties of long-life species, hoping to make medical or combat-related discoveries. However, they haven't dared to cross any lines due to their so-called "relationship" with the Alliance.

t_ch: 也许在那些学士眼中，步离人与实验动物也没什么区别。步离人之所以会袭击那艘舰船，也许就是想报复博识学会对他们的同胞的实验？
t_en: Perhaps to those scholars, borisin are no different from lab animals. Maybe the borisin attacked that ship to retaliate against the Intelligentsia Guild for experimenting on them?

t_ch: 不，如果只是单纯为了向公司和学会复仇，他们大可以破坏舰船，毁掉所有的货物。这样一来，它就不会出现在幽囚狱里了。
t_en: No, if it were only about revenge, they could just wreck the ship and destroy all the cargo, instead of allowing it to end up in The Shackling Prison.

t_ch: 这是一场刻意为之的表演，将「货物」的危险程度暴露在人前，只为了让它们能顺利被送进幽囚狱中充当劫狱的武器。
t_en: It was a deliberate display to showcase the dangerous nature of the "cargo" in broad daylight. This way, the cargo would end up in The Shackling Prison, serving as a tool for the prison break.

t_ch: 如此善用人心的盲点，这与步离人一贯的作风大相径庭。公司和博识学会怕也是在不明不白的状况下，被人当了枪使。
t_en: This skill in exploiting the blind spots of others' mindsets is so atypical of them. I'm afraid the IPC and the Intelligentsia Guild unknowingly became their accomplices.

t_ch: 不知为何，地上残破的金属小山中似乎仍藏着什么东西蠢蠢欲动。
t_en: Something seems to be hiding in the pile of metal on the ground, ready to move.

t_ch: 两位，当心。这东西还活着！
t_en: Watch out. This thing is still alive!

t_ch: 巨大的机器重回沉寂，像是流干了血的伤兽，再也无力动弹。
t_en: The giant machine goes silent again. Like a wounded beast drained of blood, it can no longer move.

t_ch: 将军一直没回答我的问题呢，「为何呼雷被囚禁在罗浮而非曜青」。您如此三缄其口，莫非这一处置并不是什么荣耀？
t_en: You haven't answered my question about why Hoolay was imprisoned in the Luofu instead of the Yaoqing, General. You've been reserved in your response. Could it be that such an arrangement wasn't an honor?

t_ch: 元帅没有将呼雷留在曜青的原因，就在眼前这台机器上。
t_en: The reason why the marshal didn't leave Hoolay on the Yaoqing lies in the very mech in front of us.

t_ch: …你是说，有人想要像这台机器所代表的那样，破解呼雷的秘密，学以致用？
t_en: ...Are you suggesting that there are people trying to understand Hoolay's secrets and use them for their own purposes, just like with this mech?

t_ch: 我明白了。我听说曜青的狐人与步离人的血脉尤为相近，其中有些狐族子裔会像步离人一样，不可遏制地陷入名为「月狂」的疯症。
t_en: Well, I understand. I've heard that the foxians on the Yaoqing share a bloodline with the borisin, and just like the borisin, some of the foxians there experience an uncontrollable insanity called Moon Rage.

t_ch: 元帅认为此事有非人之嫌，与步离人无异，所以……
t_en: The marshal believed that this would be inhumane and no different from what the borisin did, so...

t_ch: 你没猜错。在步离人看来，月狂是解放力量的恩赐；但对狐人来说，这是血脉中避之不及的疯狂。曜青的医士们世世代代都有人试图破解这一谜题，但始终不得其法。
t_en: Exactly. While borisin see Moon Rage as a blessing that unlocks their true potential, foxians see it as an inevitable curse within their bloodline. Countless healers of the Yaoqing have attempted to unravel this mystery, but to no avail.

t_ch: 「为何步离人能控制月狂？」「狐人能否破除这一诅咒？」…总会有人问起这样的问题。
t_en: "Why can borisin control the power of Moon Rage?" "Can we foxians break free from this curse?" ...These questions were asked frequently.

t_ch: 每个提问之人的初衷都满怀善意。但是，世上所有通往灾难的道路，都是由善念铺就的。
t_en: Each questioner had good intentions, but the road to catastrophe is paved with good intentions.

t_ch: 对曜青的狐人而言，「呼雷」不仅仅是步离人的战首，也是怪物，是他们的研究对象。他成了腐蚀人心却不自知的剧毒。
t_en: To the foxians of the Yaoqing, Hoolay was not only the Warhead of the borisin but also a monster that could be the subject of much research. Hoolay thus became a poison that corrupted people's minds without their knowing.

t_ch: 所以，元帅将呼雷囚禁在罗浮。这确实不是荣誉，而是…告诫。
t_en: That's why the marshal decided to imprison Hoolay in the Luofu. It wasn't an honor but rather... a warning.

t_ch: 因为同样为了一念私心，为了所谓的利人善举，罗浮上曾经发生过一桩足以警示后人的悲剧。
t_en: Because such selfish pursuits in the name of "good intentions" once led to a tragedy on the Luofu that served as a warning to future generations.

t_ch: 「饮月之乱」。
t_en: The Sedition of Imbibitor Lunae.

t_ch: 元帅借呼雷移交罗浮一事，既暂时平息了曜青狐人的恶念，也告诫了经历乱局的罗浮仙舟。
t_en: By imprisoning Hoolay in the Xianzhou Luofu, the marshal both suppressed the dangerous intentions of the Yaoqing foxians and warned the Xianzhou Luofu to refrain from repeating its mistake.

t_ch: 这就是「权衡」，也是不得不做的一步。仙舟联盟不是只有仙舟人的一言堂。狐人，持明，仙舟人三族共盟，方有未来。
t_en: That was a necessary trade-off. The Xianzhou Alliance is not solely about the Xianzhou natives. Only when all three races — Foxian, Vidyadhara, and Xianzhou natives — form an alliance will there be a promising future for all.

t_ch: 灵砂受教了。您当年也怀着这样的心态「权衡」了我的师父，将她放逐去了朱明仙舟，却坐看「药王秘传」在其中死灰复燃？
t_en: Thank you for enlightening me. Was it for the same reason that you "traded off" my mentor to the Xianzhou Zhuming, only to stand idle and allow the resurgence of the Disciples of Sanctus Medicus?

t_ch: 你说我舍不得对丹鼎司剜肉疗毒，倒是把想要施救的医者送去了朱明仙舟……
t_en: You said that I couldn't bear to cut out the malignant tumor within the Alchemy Commission but instead exiled the healer who tried to solve the problem to the Xianzhou Zhuming...

t_ch: 那么令师有没有告诉你…她为了自己一厢情愿的善念，借探视的便利，为彼时才刚刚蜕生完毕的丹恒施展了能回忆前生知识的医术？
t_en: But did your mentor tell you... her "good intentions" led her to perform certain healing arts on Dan Heng, who had just finished his hatching rebirth, so that he would regain the memories of his past life?

t_ch: 你说什么？
t_en: What did you just say?

t_ch: 她以为龙尊恢复前世神智，便能重续持明族守望建木的职责，能让蠢蠢欲动的势力蛰伏，也能让族中一切纷争平息重回正轨。
t_en: She believed that restoring the High Elder's knowledge of his past life would allow the Vidyadhara to resume their duty as the guardians of the Ambrosial Arbor, quelling the strife within their clan and bringing everything back on the right path.

t_ch: 但正如我方才所说：许多利人善举，不过是灾难的开始。自那之后，六御合议决定，丹鼎司不再有司鼎一职，直到你今日前来。
t_en: But just as I mentioned earlier, the road to catastrophe is always paved with good intentions. Since then, the Six Charioteers decided that the Alchemy Commission would no longer have a Cauldron Master, until your arrival now.

t_ch: 如此说来，妾身要感谢将军以一纸流放令保护了老师。
t_en: If that's the case, I should thank you for protecting my mentor by exiling her, General.

t_ch: 恰恰相反，是我该谢你才对。
t_en: Quite the contrary. I should be the one thanking you.

t_ch: 谢我？
t_en: Thanking me?

t_ch: 我所行所求，不过是「问心无愧」四字。但长生种漫长的一生中，真能无愧吗？灵砂小姐为师父的判罚牵累，也不得不远走他乡，对个中缘由一无所知。
t_en: All I ever want is to have a clear conscience. However, can long-life species truly achieve that goal in their long-drawn lives? For example, you were implicated along with your mentor and forced to leave your homeland without knowing the truth.

t_ch: 而今丹鼎司的情况错综复杂，联盟将你派来挑起这桩苦差事，是省了我的心。难道我不应该谢你吗？
t_en: And now, with the complicated situation in the Alchemy Commission, the Alliance has spared me a lot of trouble by sending you to handle this challenging task. Shouldn't I be thanking you instead?

t_ch: …不愧是神策将军，连让人兴师问罪的话茬都不留一个。
t_en: ...Your eloquence is indeed impressive, Divine Foresight. You won't even leave me any excuses to hold a grudge against you.

t_ch: 有言在先，联盟将我派来此处，是要我妥善处理公事，可不是让我选边站的。
t_en: But let me make it clear: The Alliance sent me here to handle the business impartially, not to choose sides.

t_ch: 灵砂小姐想站在谁这一边不重要，毕竟你和我都站在联盟这一边，不是吗？我们走吧。
t_en: It doesn't matter which side you choose, Miss Lingsha. At the end of the day, both you and I stand on the side of the Alliance, don't we? Let's keep going.

t_ch: 一地狼藉尸骸，显然这里经历了一场激战。
t_en: A mess of bodies, a fierce battle must have been fought here.

t_ch: （检查魔阴身遗体）
t_en: (Examine the mara-struck remains)

t_ch: 死在此地的魔阴身…似乎并不是囚牢里逃离的犯人。
t_en: These mara-struck soldiers... don't appear to be escaped prisoners.

t_ch: 何以见得？
t_en: How can you tell?

t_ch: 这些魔阴身衣甲武器齐备，显然不是仓促加入战斗的。
t_en: These soldiers are fully armed. Obviously, they didn't hastily join the battle.

t_ch: 那个叫貊泽的曜青使者说过，来劫狱的犯人共有两拨。除去步离人外，还有一群能隐藏行迹的魔阴身。他所指的应该就是这些人了。
t_en: The messenger named Moze did say that there were two groups of attackers. The other attackers, aside from the borisin, could hide their tracks. I believe he was referring to these people.

t_ch: 「隐藏行迹」？
t_en: Hide their tracks?

t_ch: 不错，我与这些魔阴身交过手，他们使用云吟术遮掩身形。如果不谨慎观察，无人能察觉他们的行踪。
t_en: Exactly. I've engaged with these attackers before, and they used cloudhymn magic to hide their presence. Without careful observation, no one can detect them.

t_ch: 丹恒先生曾经警告我慎重处理持明长老对丹鼎司的干涉。难不成……
t_en: You once warned me to be cautious of the Vidyadhara Elders' influence within the Alchemy Commission. Could it be...

t_ch: 灵砂小姐看出什么来了？
t_en: What's on your mind, Miss Lingsha?

t_ch: 其一，以步离劫狱者逃离幽囚狱的路线来看，应当是有人将幽囚狱的地形透露给了他们。在幽囚狱的修建过程中，持明族出力不少。
t_en: Well, it seems that someone provided the attackers with a map of The Shackling Prison. And considering the Vidyadhara's involvement in the prison's construction, it raises suspicions about their role in this.

t_ch: 其二，伪装的步离人需要服药才能维持狐人形貌。显然丹鼎司中仍有余孽在暗中帮助。
t_en: Additionally, the fact that the borisin need medicine to disguise themselves suggests that there are still moles within the Alchemy Commission assisting them covertly.

t_ch: 其三，能为潜伏的步离人伪造官方的身份，显然非身居高位之人无法办到。
t_en: Moreover, forging official identities for the undercover borisin would require someone with significant authority.

t_ch: 至于这些使用云吟的刺客，让龙师身上的这份嫌疑又加重了一些。
t_en: And the presence of assassins capable of using cloudhymn magic deepens my suspicions about the Preceptors.

t_ch: 可是他们身为持明，为何要勾结步离人，协助呼雷逃脱？
t_en: But why would the Vidyadhara collude with the borisin and aid in Hoolay's escape?

t_ch: 为了混乱。只有混乱才能给他们一线希望，让他们重新攀上权力的巅峰。
t_en: They aim to spread chaos. They believe that only in chaos can they regain their former power and influence.

t_ch: 自「饮月之乱」结束后，身为骄傲的龙脉族裔，面对日益颓败的局势，却无力回天。灵砂小姐出身罗浮，应该明白我的意思。
t_en: Since the Sedition of Imbibitor Lunae, the once-proud dragon race has been powerless, watching their influence wane. Being a native of the Luofu, Miss Lingsha, I believe you understand the implications.

t_ch: 不过在我看来，持明龙师实在算不上什么幕后黑手。那位看透了罗浮之内的种种裂痕，策动药王秘传叛乱，导致建木重生的绝灭大君——幻胧，她才是这一切背叛的根由。
t_en: However, I don't think the Preceptors are the true masterminds. If I'm not mistaken, the one behind all this treachery is the Lord Ravager who exploited the weaknesses within the Luofu and instigated the Disciples of Sanctus Medicus, ultimately leading to the Ambrosial Arbor's resurrection — Phantylia.

t_ch: 容妾身提醒将军一句，我刚才所说的一切，至多只能算是推论。刑狱公案，讲究的是一个铁证如山。若要闯入持明的洞天拿人问罪，总得让他们哑口无言才是。
t_en: Please remember, General, that everything I've mentioned is mere speculation. We need concrete evidence for a public trial. If you want to interrogate someone within the Vidyadhara's ranks, you'll need irrefutable proof.

t_ch: 灵砂小姐有什么打算呢？
t_en: So, what's your plan, Miss Lingsha?

t_ch: 妾身打算为龙师们送去一份「请柬」。
t_en: I'll send an "invitation" to the Preceptors.

t_ch: 请柬？
t_en: An invitation?

t_ch: 自我来到罗浮，龙师一再向我邀约会晤。我要将这些魔阴身的遗骸，以及幽囚狱犯人逃亡的路线图送去龙师的府邸，然后邀请他们在鳞渊境和我见上一面。
t_en: The Preceptors have been inviting me for a personal meeting since my arrival on the Luofu. Now, I'll send them the remains of these mara-struck soldiers and the route map I found in the prisoner's possession. Then, I'll ask them to meet me at Scalegorge Waterscape.

t_ch: 我想听听他们作何解释。
t_en: I'd like to hear their explanations.

t_ch: 好主意。若我出面，只怕打草惊蛇。此事就交给灵砂小姐了，持明内务仍要由持明处置。
t_en: Good idea. If I were to take action, it might alert the true mastermind. I trust you to handle this matter, Miss Lingsha. The internal affairs of the Vidyadhara should remain under their jurisdiction.

t_ch: 就算出师不利也不必担心。一旦猎狼行动结束，许多事情将会真相大白。
t_en: And don't worry if things don't go smoothly. Once the Wolf Hunt operation is over, the hidden truths will come to light.

t_ch: 说起猎狼，妾身很担心那位被劫走的曜青使者。呼雷在幽囚狱中许久未曾摄食、饥馁至今…也不知那位使者能否在他的狼口中安然渡劫。
t_en: Speaking of the Wolf Hunt operation, I'm truly worried about the Yaoqing messenger who was taken hostage. Hoolay was starving in The Shackling Prison for centuries... I don't know if the messenger can survive in that wolf's clutches.

t_ch: 愿帝弓庇佑，保他平安无虞。
t_en: May Reignbow's blessing keep him safe.

t_ch: 就是此处了。按判官所说，此处尚未收复，请小心行动。
t_en: Here we are. According to the judge, this area is not yet under control, so we should proceed cautiously.

t_ch: 我在香炉中记下了步离人所服药物的性质。
t_en: I've captured the nature of the medicine in my censer.

t_ch: 顺着药气寻索一番，应该能甄别出伪装的步离人留下的踪迹。
t_en: By following the medicinal fumes, we should be able to retrace the steps of the disguised borisin.

t_ch: 遭到这么严重的破坏，也能自我复原吗？
t_en: It can regenerate even after suffering such severe attacks?

t_ch: 他们对长生种的模仿真是太过头了。
t_en: Their imitation of long-life species has crossed the line.

t_ch: 还能动，就说明坏得还不够彻底。
t_en: If it can still move, it means it wasn't damaged enough.

t_ch: 来吧，让它再也动弹不得。
t_en: Let's make sure it never moves again.

t_ch: 演武仪典召开前两个时辰\n\n长乐天
t_en: Two dual-hours before the Wardance convenes\n\nExalting Sanctum

t_ch: 长乐天
t_en: Exalting Sanctum

t_ch: 我刚才已说过了，鄙人的职业是医士。只是我所擅长的医术需要佐以药膳烹饪才能发挥功效。
t_en: As I said, I'm a healer, but my art of healing requires the culinary arts to be truly effective.

t_ch: 能将万般药物烹做菜式，令患者吃下，这就是{RUBY_B#火锅}鼎镬{RUBY_E#}的妙用。无论什么药材食材，稀里糊涂浸入汤中炖煮，顷刻间都成了珍馐美味了。
t_en: The magic of my {RUBY_B#hot pot}cauldron{RUBY_E#} is its ability to make all kinds of medicines into dishes that patients can eat. When simmered and cooked together, any kind of medicinal herb or ingredient becomes a delightful delicacy.

t_ch: 珍馐美味…那不就是一种味道盖过了另一种味道吗？
t_en: Delicacy... but isn't that just one flavor overpowering the others?

t_ch: 你这么说也没错…在下考考你，如果现在有一个小儿吃饭挑食不吃青椒，你有什么办法能让这小儿吃下青椒呢？
t_en: Well, you have a point... Let me ask you this: If there's a fussy child who refuses to eat green peppers, what's the best way to make him eat them?

t_ch: 把这小子嘴里塞上青椒，入锅煮了。
t_en: Stuff the kid's mouth with the green peppers and cook him alive in a pot.

t_ch: 哈哈哈哈，步离仁兄幽默了。我听说步离人在自我改造的过程中丧失了不少味蕾，无法品尝出复杂的滋味，只有血肉的「咸」能唤起你们的食欲。
t_en: Hahahaha! You have quite a sense of humor. I've heard that you borisin have lost many of your taste buds during the self-modification process, so you can't experience complex flavors. Only the "saltiness" of blood and flesh truly awakens your appetite.

t_ch: 可惜我手头没有青椒，不然真想把你嘴塞上，入锅煮了。
t_en: It's a shame I don't have any green peppers right now. Otherwise, I'd happily stuff them into your mouth and cook you alive in a pot.

t_ch: 开个玩笑，别急嘛～很简单，将青椒切碎，放入肉馅之中，做成肉丸子即可。肉的味道盖过了青椒的味道，就连挑食的小孩也能吃下青椒了。
t_en: I'm just kidding. The answer is quite simple: Chop up the peppers and mix them with minced meat to make meatballs. This way, the flavor of the meat overpowers the taste of the peppers, and even a fussy child can enjoy them.

t_ch: 这火锅能煮烂你的舌头吗？我知道你的脑袋里装着什么痴心妄想。你想拖延时间，等待救兵。
t_en: Can I just boil your tongue in this hot pot? I know you're trying to buy time until someone comes to your rescue.

t_ch: 你说「镜流回到了罗浮」，她确实回来了…可惜我也探听到了更多情报，她身犯重罪，被送往了其他仙舟。
t_en: You said that Jingliu recently returned to the Luofu, right? Well, she did come back... but unfortunately, I also found out that she committed serious crimes and was escorted to another Xianzhou ship.

t_ch: 你以为凭一点小聪明激起呼雷大人的复仇心，就能拖延我们离开的脚步？
t_en: Do you really think you can delay our departure by provoking Lord Hoolay's desire for revenge with your clever little tongue?

t_ch: 别把步离人当成对仙舟一无所知的蛮子。你随身携带的玉兆，还有天上飞过的机巧鸟…仙舟人能追踪到我们的手段我全都一清二楚。
t_en: You see borisin as savages who know nothing about the Xianzhou, but in fact, we know all about your tracking tricks... like the jade abacus you're carrying and the cycranes in the sky.

t_ch: 心中的希望越大，死亡降临时的痛苦就越发强烈。等我撕开你喉咙的那一刻，我想看看你的表情是否还能像刚才那样镇定。
t_en: The more hope you hold in your heart, the greater your pain will be when death comes. I wonder if you can maintain your composure when I tear your throat open.

t_ch: 他的镇定只是一时的药效。但药效很快就要过去了，对吧？
t_en: His composure is only a temporary effect of the medicine, and it will wear off soon, right?

t_ch: 呼雷大人。
t_en: Lord Hoolay.

t_ch: 可悲的狐人，数千年来，是我们允许你们苟活，是我们给了你们文明。但为了仙舟人承诺的自由，你们最终还是选择了背叛。
t_en: You pathetic foxians. For thousands of years, we were the ones who allowed you to live and who granted you civilization, but in the end, you chose to betray us for the "freedom" promised by the Xianzhou people.

t_ch: 不过没关系，只要嗅到{RUBY_B#步离}主人{RUBY_E#}的气味，你们总会乖乖回到我们身边的…无论逃多远。
t_en: But it's alright. As long as you catch the scent of your {RUBY_B#borisins}masters{RUBY_E#}, you obediently return to us... no matter how far you run away.

t_ch: （反击，指出他们在逃亡）
t_en: (Refute him by pointing out that they are the runaways)

t_ch: 逃？现在想要逃跑的人可不是我。
t_en: Run away, you said? Well, I'm not the one who's trying to run away right now.

t_ch: （挑拨，分裂末度与呼雷）
t_en: (Sow discord between Mok Tok and Hoolay)

t_ch: 呼雷，你有没有想过，为何过去整整七百年，这些家伙才想到要来营救你？
t_en: Hoolay, have you ever wondered why it took them seven centuries to come to your rescue?

t_ch: 步离人不可一世的时代早就过去了。在给你回家的希望之前，他们有没有把这些可悲的事实告诉你，呼雷大人？
t_en: The borisin's era has long passed. Did they ever tell you these harsh facts before giving you hope for returning home, Lord Hoolay?

t_ch: 如今他们被曜青的「天击将军」…被一个狐人碾成一盘散沙，躲藏在银河角落里瑟瑟发抖。像一头快要溺死的伤兽，绝望地伸手去抓任何一根幻想中的救命稻草，也就是你。
t_en: Now they're being crushed by the Merlin's Claw of the Yaoqing... by a foxian. They're hiding in remote corners of the cosmos, trembling with fear, like a wounded beast on its last legs, reaching out desperately for any fake hope of salvation, which in this case is you.

t_ch: 曜青的将军…一个狐人？很有意思。末度，他所说的一切是真的吗？
t_en: The Merlin's Claw of the Yaoqing... A foxian? Very interesting. Tell me, Mok Tok, is he speaking the truth?

t_ch: …他没有说谎。那是个从猎群中逃跑的战奴，一个炮灰，一个窃贼！她偷走了我们的力量，靠着对步离人的了解，在战争中用尽一切卑鄙手段——
t_en: ...He isn't lying. That lowly beast was a war slave who ran away from our pack! Cannon fodder! A thief! She stole our power and used her knowledge about us to fight us, using every dirty trick in the book...

t_ch: 她打败了你们。末度，不公平是为死人和失败者准备的托词。既然猎群四分五裂，又是谁告诉你们我还活着，谁把你们派来这儿？
t_en: And she bested you, Mok Tok. Fairness is but a pathetic excuse for the dead and defeated. Since our great pack has fallen apart, who told you that I was alive? And who sent you here?

t_ch: 在我们最绝望的时候，是长生主的先知「蟒古思」为我们指点迷津。靠她的指引，我们渐渐看到了希望。
t_en: In our darkest hours, it was a Prophet of the Master of Immortality, named Mangas, who showed us the way. Her guidance brought us hope.

t_ch: 先知「蟒古思」…她想做什么？
t_en: This Prophet Mangas... What does she want?

t_ch: 这位先知颁下预言：步离人分裂太久了，只有您的归来才能统合所有猎群，重现往日的辉煌！我们这才得知您还活着…一定是长生主显灵！
t_en: The Prophet made this proclamation: The borisin have been divided for too long, and only your return can unite all the packs, restoring us to our former glory! That's when we learned that you were still alive... It must have been a manifestation of the Master of Immortality!

t_ch: 先知告诉我们，曜青的狐人将军会借罗浮演武仪典召开的时机将您带走，这是我们混入此处，将您从牢狱里解放出来的绝佳时机——一切正如她所说！我们也做到了！
t_en: And the Prophet told us that the foxian general of the Yaoqing would take you to her ship during the Luofu's Wardance, and that it would be our best chance to infiltrate and free you from your prison. And just as she said, we did it!

t_ch: （反击，指出计划还没成功）
t_en: (Refute him by pointing out that their plan has not succeeded yet)

t_ch: 就算你们能带走呼雷，你们也不可能逃得出去。
t_en: Even if you managed to set Hoolay free, you'd have no way to escape.

t_ch: 我们早就准备好了船只，先知的预言一定会成为现实。
t_en: We've already prepared our ships, and the Prophet's prediction will surely come true.

t_ch: （挑拨，指出蟒古思的用心）
t_en: (Sow discord by pointing out Mangas' ulterior motives)

t_ch: 你们统统被那个所谓的先知骗了，她只是派你们来送死。
t_en: That so-called prophet lied to all of you. She just sent you here to die.

t_ch: 但她的预言也实现了！战首就在此处！
t_en: But her prophecy has come true! Our Warhead is right here, with us!

t_ch: 幽囚狱的消息一旦传开，云骑会封锁所有港口。你们以为自己逃出了监狱，但你们只是被困在「罗浮」这个牢笼中。
t_en: Once the news about the prison break spreads, the Cloud Knights will close all the ports. You may think you've escaped the prison, but you're just trapped in another cage known as the Luofu.

t_ch: 呼雷大人，杀了他，杀了这个拨弄是非的贱畜！我向您保证，接应的星槎很快就会到来！
t_en: Let me kill this unruly lowly beast, Lord Hoolay! I assure you that our starskiffs will soon arrive.

t_ch: 眼下整个罗浮都被那个愚蠢的演武仪典吸引了注意力，正是我们逃离罗浮的最佳机会。一旦您回到忠诚于您的领地，您对仙舟的复仇也将指日可待。
t_en: Right now, everyone in the Luofu is distracted by the stupid Wardance, so this will be the perfect chance to escape. Once you've returned to your territory, your revenge against the Xianzhou ships will be within reach.

t_ch: 机会？回到一蹶不振的孱弱猎群，受可笑的假先知摆布，成为被她攥在手里摇晃呐喊的大旗？她的计划充满了漏洞。她为你们准备的道路只有「逃跑」和「死亡」。
t_en: Perfect chance? To return to my weak and shattered pack, at the mercy of a ridiculous false prophet, and become a mere puppet in her clutches? Heh, her plan is full of flaws. The only paths she has prepared for you are escape and death.

t_ch: 听好了，「狼」绝不会允许自己成为猎物。接下来你必须听我的命令行事。
t_en: Listen up, a wolf never allows itself to become prey. From now on, you'll follow my orders.

t_ch: 椒丘，既然你说「云骑会封锁港口」，我会让你亲自去港口瞧瞧，究竟云骑是否如你所想。<color=#dbc291ff>把你所看到的答案告诉我</color>。
t_en: Since you are so confident that the Cloud Knights will close the ports, Jiaoqiu, I'm now giving you a chance to go and see it for yourself. Go to the ports, come back, and <color=#dbc291ff>tell me what you saw</color>.

t_ch: …你说什么？
t_en: ...Wait, what did you just say?

t_ch: 大人——！
t_en: But my Lord...!

t_ch: 末度，你什么时候听过头狼会服从幼崽的命令？
t_en: Would an alpha wolf ever listen to a cub, Mok Tok?

t_ch: 从未听过…我、我并没有向您发号施令，我也绝对服从您的指示。
t_en: No, I've never heard anything like that... I... I wasn't trying to defy your will. I will always unquestioningly follow your orders.

t_ch: 为什么不派你的手下去？
t_en: Why don't you send your people?

t_ch: 这可是千载难逢的机会，你不想逃走吗，椒丘？
t_en: I'm offering you a once-in-a-lifetime opportunity. Don't you want to run away, Jiaoqiu?

t_ch: 你想玩什么把戏？
t_en: What game are you playing?

t_ch: 不过是狩猎前一个小小余兴节目罢了。你不想逃走吗？
t_en: Just a little pre-hunt entertainment. Don't you want to run away?

t_ch: 你会回来的。因为你们这些狐人总会乖乖回到主人身边的…无论逃多远。
t_en: You will come back, because foxians like you always obediently return to their masters... no matter how far they run away.

t_ch: 知道我为什么敢放你离开吗？因为你们这些狐人总会乖乖回到主人身边的…无论逃多远。
t_en: You know why I'm letting you go? Because foxians like you always obediently return to their masters... no matter how far they run away.

t_ch: <color=#dbc291ff>去港口看看，然后回来告诉我。</color>看看你一心期盼的封锁有没有出现。
t_en: <color=#dbc291ff>Head to the port and report back to me.</color> Let's see if they really closed it like you expected.

t_ch: 虽然我不懂呼雷大人的用意。但别以为自己能逃走，明白吗？
t_en: I don't fully understand Lord Hoolay's intentions, but don't think you can simply run away. Understood?

t_ch: 水…我想喝口水。
t_en: Water... I need some water.

t_ch: 真是一时鬼迷心窍…早知道要死在这儿，还不如回到幽囚狱里蹲大牢…好死不如赖活着。
t_en: What the heck was I thinking...? If I knew it would end like this, I would've stayed in The Shackling Prison. Better to live in shackles than die free.

t_ch: （检查伤势）
t_en: (Examine his injuries)

t_ch: 让我看看伤势。我能帮上忙的。
t_en: Let me take a look. I can help you out.

t_ch: 你是医士吗？给我包扎一下…我还想好好活着。
t_en: Are you a healer? Please bandage me up... I don't want to die.

t_ch: 知道我们在哪吗？
t_en: Do you know where we are?

t_ch: 你知道我们现在在哪儿吗？
t_en: Do you know where we are right now?

t_ch: 我不清楚，我和你一样，是被蒙着脑袋带到了这儿的。
t_en: I don't know. I was brought here blindfolded, just like you.

t_ch: （虽然呼雷一行眼下能够藏身于闹市之中，但被发现也只是时间问题。他敢放我离开，到底有什么打算？）
t_en: (Although Hoolay and his followers can currently hide in the city, it won't be long before they're found. What was he planning when he let me go?)

t_ch: 我还不想死……
t_en: I don't want to die yet...

t_ch: 在我面前转悠干什么？
t_en: Why are you wasting time here?

t_ch: 你是步离人。
t_en: You are borisin.

t_ch: 不错。
t_en: That's right.

t_ch: 你看着太像狐人了…
t_en: You look exactly like a foxian...

t_ch: 你们就是靠着这种手段混进仙舟的。如果不是我对步离人的气味足够熟悉…也无法判断真假。
t_en: So, that's how you managed to infiltrate the Xianzhou ship. If I hadn't been so familiar with the scent of borisin, I wouldn't have been able to tell.

t_ch: 没见过这样神异的魔药，对吧？
t_en: Never heard of such miraculous medicine, huh?

t_ch: （服药变化？听说在建木灾异时，丹鼎司内部发生了叛乱…想来这些潜入者在罗浮仙舟上有内应。）
t_en: (Medicine? I heard there was a mutiny within the Alchemy Commission during the Ambrosial Arbor Crisis... These infiltrators must have connections within the Xianzhou Luofu.)

t_ch: 大人让你去港口瞧瞧，贱畜，你还在这儿磨蹭什么？
t_en: Lord Hoolay ordered you to go to the port and take a look, you lowly beast. Why are you still lingering here?

t_ch: 大人让你去港口瞧瞧，贱畜，你还在这儿磨蹭什么？
t_en: Lord Hoolay ordered you to go to the port and take a look, you lowly beast. Why are you still lingering here?

t_ch: （他竟然真的放我自由行动…他到底在玩什么把戏？）
t_en: (I can't believe he actually let me go... What game is he playing?)

t_ch: （我也许可以试着偷偷向外发出警告…不，也许我有机会可以直接离开这儿……）
t_en: (Perhaps I can try to warn the Cloud Knights... No, perhaps I can just escape...)

t_ch: （四下看看）
t_en: (Look around)

t_ch: 一个表情阴冷的狐人若有似无地看向椒丘，那目光的压力太过锐利，似乎警示着椒丘<color=#eb4d3dff>「任何自作聪明的小心思，终将酿成追悔莫及的严重后果」</color>。
t_en: A foxian with a cold expression gazes at Jiaoqiu. There is sharp pressure to the gaze, carrying as if a warning to the healer that says: <color=#eb4d3dff>"Every clever little thought you bear might lead to severe consequence you will come to regret."</color>

t_ch: （我就知道…这家伙是在试探我。）
t_en: (Just as I suspected... he's testing me.)

t_ch: （继续前往港口）
t_en: (Continue towards the port)

t_ch: （云骑应该早就察觉幽囚狱的状况了吧。飞霄会不会亲自带队来抓捕呼雷呢？）
t_en: (The Cloud Knights must have been aware of the situation inside The Shackling Prison for some time. Will General Feixiao personally lead a squad to capture Hoolay?)

t_ch: （眼下先按这家伙说的办吧。）
t_en: (For now, I'll do as he asked.)

t_ch: 计程槎驾驶员只是每日辛勤载客的平凡人，<color=#eb4d3dff>若是轻举妄动向他求助，无论成功与否，都会引发严重的后果</color>…切记，千万要谨言慎行。
t_en: The starskiff pilot is just an ordinary but hardworking individual who ferries people from place to place every day. <color=#eb4d3dff>Understand if you thoughtlessly ask him for aid, you will reap severe repercussions regardless if the outcome is a success or failure.</color> ...Remember: Be mindful of your words and actions.

t_ch: 在此值勤的云骑士兵孤立无援，<color=#eb4d3dff>若是轻举妄动向她求助，无论成功与否，都会引发严重的后果</color>…切记，千万要谨言慎行。
t_en: The Cloud Knights Soldier on duty here is alone and without reinforcements. <color=#eb4d3dff>Understand if you thoughtlessly ask her for aid, you will reap severe repercussions regardless if the outcome is a success or failure.</color> ...Remember: Be mindful of your words and actions.

t_ch: 地衡司勤务并不擅长处理这类突发情况，<color=#eb4d3dff>若是轻举妄动向他求助，无论成功与否，都会引发严重的后果</color>…切记，千万要谨言慎行。
t_en: The Realm-Keeping Commission orderly is not accustomed to handling emergencies like this one. <color=#eb4d3dff>Understand if you thoughtlessly ask him for aid, you will reap severe repercussions regardless if the outcome is a success or failure.</color> ...Remember: Be mindful of your words and actions.

t_ch: 港口看起来并无异状。你心中充满了忐忑。
t_en: Nothing seems out of the ordinary in the harbor. You're filled with anxiety.

t_ch: 请问您是要乘坐星槎吗？
t_en: Would you like to board my starskiff?

t_ch: 你敏锐地察觉到计程槎驾驶员附近的狐人乘客上下打量着你。
t_en: You keenly notice that the foxian passengers near the Starskiff Pilot are looking you up and down.

t_ch: 是，不过不止我一个人…
t_en: Yes, but we have several passengers...

t_ch: 能坐下多少位客人呢？
t_en: How many passengers can you accommodate?

t_ch: 哟，我这小星槎可坐不下这么多人…不过我有更大的星槎，如果客人有需要的话，不消一刻钟就能到港，客人是打算去哪里呢？
t_en: Well, my little starskiff can't accommodate that many... but I have a larger one that will arrive in less than fifteen minutes if you need it. So, where would you like to go?

t_ch: 不管你要去哪里，都得赶快了。演武仪典马上就要开始了。天舶司正在对空域进行调控，让去竞锋舰的星槎优先航行呢。
t_en: We need to hurry, wherever we're going. The Wardance is about to start, and the Sky-Faring Commission is prioritizing starskiffs heading to the Skysplitter.

t_ch: 云骑有没有封锁港口？
t_en: Have the Cloud Knights closed the ports?

t_ch: 云骑…为什么要封锁港口？
t_en: Closed the ports...? Why would they do that?

t_ch: 想去玉界门外边，方便吗？
t_en: I want to get outside the Jade Gate. Can you take me there?

t_ch: 啊？您开什么玩笑，这艘小小的星槎怎么可能飞出玉界门啊？
t_en: What? Are you joking? How can I take you beyond the Jade Gate in this tiny starskiff?

t_ch: <color=#eb4d3dff>小声说话，方便吗？</color>
t_en: <color=#eb4d3dff>Can we keep this quiet?</color>

t_ch: 有什么话非得小声说吗？哈哈哈哈，客人有话不妨直接说。
t_en: Keep what quiet? Hahahahaha! Come on, spill it if you have something to say.

t_ch: <color=#eb4d3dff>能载着我离开这里吗？</color>
t_en: <color=#eb4d3dff>Can you give me a ride out of here?</color>

t_ch: 现在客人要一个人走吗？起步价六巡镝，您打算去哪儿？
t_en: You want to leave alone now? Sure, the starting fare is six strales. Where do you want to go?

t_ch: 由于被步离人搜过身的缘故，你身无分文。
t_en: You were searched by the borisin, and now you have no money on you.

t_ch: 客人，坐霸王船可不行啊。要不您先去取个钱，我随时可以走。
t_en: Hey, you can't take my starskiff for free. Maybe you should withdraw some money first? I'll be ready whenever you are.

t_ch: <color=#eb4d3dff>能帮我向地衡司报个警吗？</color>
t_en: <color=#eb4d3dff>Could you deliver a message to the Realm-Keeping Commission for me?</color>

t_ch: 地衡司就在不远处，我这还有生意要做，要不您就自己去跑一趟吧！
t_en: The Realm-Keeping Commission? It's right up ahead. Look, I've got a business to run, so why don't you go there yourself?

t_ch: 没什么，就问你的船安不安全。
t_en: Never mind. I just wanted to ask if your starskiff is safe enough.

t_ch: 我这也算是从业快一百年的老手了啊。安全，太安全了！
t_en: Hah! I've been in this business for almost a century! You won't find a safer starskiff around here!

t_ch: 咱们这星槎随时都可以走。
t_en: I'm ready to leave whenever you are.

t_ch: 别问了，不走，找别人吧。
t_en: Stop asking. I'm off-duty now. Go bother someone else.

t_ch: 你敏锐地嗅到了眼前这个飞行士打扮的狐人身上有股熟悉的味道。
t_en: You sniff a familiar scent on the foxian pilot.

t_ch: 能问下为什么吗？
t_en: May I ask why?

t_ch: 事儿真多。
t_en: Can't you just stop asking?

t_ch: 如果战首说要走呢？
t_en: What if the Warhead wants to leave?

t_ch: 你不是我们的人，但你身上有些熟悉的味道。
t_en: You're not one of us, but I smell a familiar scent on you.

t_ch: 是战首叫我来看看情况的。
t_en: The Warhead sent me here to check on the situation.

t_ch: 云骑没有封锁港口吗？
t_en: Have the Cloud Knights closed the ports?

t_ch: 没有的事。倒是天舶司正在清空航道，给登上竞锋舰的星槎让路。这样一来，咱们的船在逃离时会变得更显眼。
t_en: No, not at all. Instead, the Sky-Faring Commission is clearing routes to prioritize starskiffs heading to the Skysplitter. This will make our ships more noticeable when we try to escape.

t_ch: 战首问能走了吗？
t_en: The Warhead wants to know if we can leave now.

t_ch: 还不行，我这儿的小船根本无法逃离仙舟，只有迴星港那儿的舰船才有机会冲破玉界门。末度说会有内应来接我们，可我根本没收到回音。
t_en: Not yet. There's no way for this tiny ship to escape from the Xianzhou. Only the starships at Stargazer Navalia can break through the Jade Gate. Mok Tok said there would be insiders to pick us up, but I haven't heard anything yet.

t_ch: 到底是怎么回事…迴星港早该传来消息了。
t_en: What exactly is happening... We should have received word from Stargazer Navalia long ago.

t_ch: 你好，我看你瞧我好一阵了，需要我帮助吗？
t_en: Hey there, I noticed you've been looking at me for quite a while. Do you need my help?

t_ch: 你敏锐地感到不远处有一道目光正死死盯着你。
t_en: You can sense someone staring at you from not far away.

t_ch: <color=#eb4d3dff>我需要你的帮助。</color>
t_en: <color=#eb4d3dff>I need your help.</color>

t_ch: 请详细说明需要怎样的帮助。
t_en: Could you please provide more details?

t_ch: <color=#eb4d3dff>有步离人躲在这里。</color>
t_en: <color=#eb4d3dff>Borisin are hiding nearby.</color>

t_ch: 什么？！你能确定吗？
t_en: What!? Are you sure about that?

t_ch: 等等…我认得你，你是那个失联的曜青使节。你怎么在这儿？
t_en: Wait... I recognize you... You're the lost Yaoqing messenger. How are you here?

t_ch: 我被步离人挟持来到了这儿。请务必把消息报上去。
t_en: I was brought here by the borisin. Please make sure to report this news.

t_ch: 好，我这就找人。
t_en: Alright, I'll call for reinforcements.

t_ch: <color=#eb4d3dff>我是曜青使节椒丘。</color>
t_en: <color=#eb4d3dff>I'm Jiaoqiu, envoy of the Xianzhou Yaoqing.</color>

t_ch: 等等…我认得你，你是那个失联的曜青使节。你怎么在这儿？
t_en: Wait... I recognize you... You're the lost Yaoqing messenger. How are you here?

t_ch: 我被步离人挟持来到了这儿。请务必把消息报上去。
t_en: I was brought here by the borisin. Please make sure to report this news.

t_ch: 好，我这就找人。
t_en: Alright, I'll call for reinforcements.

t_ch: 没、没什么。
t_en: No, it's nothing.

t_ch: 了解，如果您需要帮助，请来找我。
t_en: Understood. Please come to me if you need any help.

t_ch: 没事，我只是随便逛逛。
t_en: It's nothing. I'm just wandering around.

t_ch: 了解，如果您需要帮助，请来找我。
t_en: Understood. Please come to me if you need any help.

t_ch: 不好意思，执事和执事官被调去援助演武仪典工作了，地衡司公廨暂不开放。
t_en: I'm sorry, but the Realm-Keeping Commission Chancery is currently closed. All the officers and officials have been reassigned to assist in the Wardance.

t_ch: 你敏锐地感到不远处有一道目光正死死盯着你。
t_en: You can sense someone staring at you from not far away.

t_ch: <color=#eb4d3dff>我需要你的帮助。</color>
t_en: <color=#eb4d3dff>I need your help.</color>

t_ch: 如果我能帮上您的话……
t_en: If I can help you...

t_ch: <color=#eb4d3dff>有步离人躲在这里。</color>
t_en: <color=#eb4d3dff>Borisin are hiding nearby.</color>

t_ch: …步离人？在这儿？你认真的吗？
t_en: ...Borisin? Here? Are you serious?

t_ch: 这些步离人伪装成了狐人的样子，拜托了，请立刻通报云骑。
t_en: These borisin are disguised as foxians. Please warn the Cloud Knights immediately.

t_ch: 你在这儿等我一会好嘛？我找个士兵过来。
t_en: Will you please wait here for a while? I'll find a soldier.

t_ch: <color=#eb4d3dff>我是曜青使节椒丘。</color>
t_en: <color=#eb4d3dff>I'm Jiaoqiu, envoy of the Xianzhou Yaoqing.</color>

t_ch: 你好，请问曜青使节需要什么帮助吗？
t_en: Hi, do you need my help, messenger from the Xianzhou Yaoqing?

t_ch: 步离人躲在长乐天，你要把消息带给云骑军。
t_en: Borisin are hiding in the Exalting Sanctum. You must deliver this news to the Cloud Knights.

t_ch: …步离人？在这儿？你认真的吗？
t_en: ...Borisin? Here? Are you serious?

t_ch: 这些步离人伪装成了狐人的样子，拜托了，请立刻通报云骑。
t_en: These borisin are disguised as foxians. Please warn the Cloud Knights immediately.

t_ch: 你在这儿等我一会好嘛？我找个士兵过来。
t_en: Will you please wait here for a while? I'll find a soldier.

t_ch: 没、没什么。
t_en: No, it's nothing.

t_ch: 嗨，虽然眼下人手不足，但要是有什么想要我帮助的尽管开口，别客气啊。
t_en: Hey, although we're short-staffed at the moment, if there's anything I can do to help, please feel free to ask me.

t_ch: 没事，我只是随便逛逛。
t_en: It's nothing. I'm just wandering around.

t_ch: 嗨，虽然眼下人手不足，但要是有什么想要我帮助的尽管开口，别客气啊。
t_en: Hey, although we're short-staffed at the moment, if there's anything I can do to help, please feel free to ask me.

t_ch: （有人在盯着我…不行，我不能跑得太远。）
t_en: (Someone is keeping an eye on me... No, I can't get too far away.)

t_ch: （港口没有封锁…到底是怎么回事？）
t_en: (The ports haven't been closed... What is going on?)

t_ch: （看来拖延时间没有意义，该是去面对呼雷的时候了。让我看看他到底想玩什么把戏……）
t_en: (Stalling won't help... It's time to confront Hoolay and see what tricks he's up to...)

t_ch: 你回来了，椒丘。
t_en: You're back, Jiaoqiu.

t_ch: 你来瞧瞧，这些人都是谁？
t_en: Come and take a good look. Who are these people?

t_ch: 你来瞧瞧，这人是谁？
t_en: Come and take a good look. Who is this person?

t_ch: 这位云骑大哥说，有公务需要我配合。
t_en: This Cloud Knight says there's official business that requires my cooperation.

t_ch: 别担心，这位长官会帮我们的。
t_en: Don't worry, this captain will help us.

t_ch: 这位云骑大哥会帮你的。
t_en: This Cloud Knight will help you.

t_ch: 末度，你想干什么？
t_en: What are you trying to do, Mok Tok?

t_ch: 末度，你想做什么？这一切和他们无关！
t_en: What are you trying to do, Mok Tok? They have nothing to do with this!

t_ch: 无关？我只是让你去港口看看情况…可从来没有允许你三心二意和人交谈啊。
t_en: Nothing to do? I told you to go to the port and check out the situation... but I never gave you permission to talk with others.

t_ch: 记住，他们是因你而死的。
t_en: Remember, these people died because of you.

t_ch: 记住，这个人是因你而死的。
t_en: Remember, this person died because of you.

t_ch: 令人作呕的骨裂声在小院中响起。没有惨叫，你甚至没能听到挣扎的声音。
t_en: A sickening crack of bones echoed through the small courtyard. There was no scream, not even the sound of a struggle.

t_ch: 你要向我证明…这里所有人的性命统统握在你手里，对吧，呼雷？！
t_en: You want to prove to me that... you hold everyone's lives in your hands, right, Hoolay!?

t_ch: 你一直在监视着我，如果我向谁求救，你的人就会杀了他们…我说的没错吧，呼雷？
t_en: You were closely watching me, weren't you? And if I sought help from anyone, your people would kill them... Was that your plan, Hoolay?

t_ch: 你说的不错。那么，你等来了云骑封锁港口吗？
t_en: Exactly as you said. So, have the Cloud Knights closed the ports?

t_ch: …没有。
看起来，他们并不希望将我的逃离公之于众。这不意外，恐惧比爪牙更致命…尤其是在「演武仪典」这样的节庆时刻。
t_en: They don't want to publicize my escape. I understand. It's no surprise, for fear is more deadly than claws and fangs... especially during a festive time like the Wardance.

t_ch: 此刻在这里的不是一群东躲西藏的囚犯，而是走进了羊群的狼。我的狼崽子们正饥肠辘辘，他们渴望吞饮血肉，用你的恐惧来佐餐。
t_en: What lurks here is not a group of fugitives, but rather a pack of wolves amidst the flock. My cubs are hungry, ready to feast on flesh and blood, reveling in your fear.

t_ch: 椒丘，你强装镇定的外壳在我看来不堪一击，就像我随时能撕开你的皮肉，露出底下可悲的白骨。在我面前，你无所遁逃。
t_en: Your calm facade will soon crumble. I can tear through it and expose your pathetic bones anytime. There's no escape from me, Jiaoqiu.

t_ch: 你当然可以心存侥幸，以为靠自己的急智能摆脱眼下的状况。但记住，身处闹市，我们不只有你一个人质。你的任何异动，都会让无辜的人因你而死。
t_en: Of course, you can try your luck and believe that your wits will save you. But remember, you're not the only hostage in this city. If you try anything funny, innocent people will die because of you.

t_ch: 现在，我们来谈谈你侍奉的那位曜青狐人将军。末度说她为我而来，也就意味着她会亲自出马追捕我。
t_en: Now, let's talk about the foxian general you serve. Mok Tok says she's here for me, which means she'll be hunting me herself.

t_ch: 在狩猎开始前，我要了解我的对手。你可以拒绝，向我展示你的骨气；也可以合作一些，为我们双方节省时间，医士。
t_en: Before the hunt begins, I need to know my opponent. You can refuse and play tough, or you can cooperate and save us both some time, healer.

t_ch: （示弱，让呼雷以为你屈服了）
t_en: (Show weakness, making him believe you've surrendered)

t_ch: （拒绝，让他知道你不会开口）
t_en: (Refuse, letting him know you won't talk)

t_ch: 高大的男人伸出一根手指，以快到看不见的动作在你的肩胛上一点。
t_en: The tall man stretches out a finger and touches your shoulder blade with a movement so fast it's not visible.

t_ch: 仿佛被匕首剜去一块肉，疼痛凿进了骨节之间，你几乎无法站立。
t_en: It's as if a dagger has cut away a piece of flesh, and the pain pierces down to the bone. You can barely stand.
Agh...

t_ch: 很好，你没有蠢到用惨叫吸引别人的注意。这样也不会有人白白送死。
t_en: Good, at least you didn't try to draw attention with a scream. That way, no one will die in vain.

t_ch: 下一次拒绝，我会捏碎你治病救人的双手，之后是髌骨，再然后是脊骨…我会把你一寸一寸敲零割碎，只留下那条三寸不烂之舌，留到你打算开口为止。
t_en: But remember, the next time you refuse me, I'll crush your healing hands, then your knees, then your spine... I'll dismantle you piece by piece until only your silver tongue remains for you to speak.

t_ch: …我可以告诉你关于她的一切，但是，要用一个答案换一个答案。
t_en: ...Fine, I'll tell you what you want to know about her, but I expect something in return.

t_ch: 是什么错觉让你以为，你还有资格和我谈交易？
t_en: What makes you think you're still in a position to negotiate with me?

t_ch: 你可以用酷刑来折磨我，直到我开口；也可以…为我们双方节省些时间，战首。
t_en: You can torture me until I talk, or... let's save us both some time, Warhead.

t_ch: 有个问题始终困扰着我。为什么受刑七百年，你依旧还能安然无恙地活着？步离人不该有如此长久的生命…也不可能有如此顽强的复原能力。
t_en: Here's the question that's been bothering me: How have you managed to survive and endure centuries of torture? Borisin aren't supposed to live that long or possess such regenerative abilities.

t_ch: 这就是曜青仙舟想要带走我的原因？对某些人而言，我可以是握在手上的人质。但对有些人而言，他们想要的是我身上的秘密——
t_en: So, is that why the Xianzhou Yaoqing wanted to take me away? To some, I'm a hostage, but to others, I hold the secrets they desire...

t_ch: 我依旧还记得，在我被关押之初的那些岁月里，狐人们来了又去…他们从我身上抽取血髓，想破解「月狂」的成因，摆脱对步离人的恐惧，从血脉的根柢上翻身做主。
t_en: I still remember, in the early years of my captivity, the foxians came and went... They extracted my blood and marrow, trying to unravel the mystery of Moon Rage. They wanted to conquer their fear of the borisin and free themselves from their bloodline.
